{
  "name": "ecommerce-platform",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "E-commerce Platform with React, TypeScript, Node.js and Express",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc && vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "server": "node server/index.js",
    "start": "concurrently \"npm run server\" \"npm run dev\""
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "react": "^18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "react-router-dom": "^6.20.0",
    "express": "^4.18.2",
    "cors": "^2.8.5",
    "dotenv": "^16.3.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/react": "^18.2.43",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.2.17",
    "@types/node": "^20.10.4",
    "@types/express": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/cors": "^2.8.17",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.2.1",
    "typescript": "^5.3.3",
    "vite": "^5.0.8",
    "concurrently": "^8.2.2"
  }
}
